1.name: Eyes of the Wraith
1.description: Extend your senses into the Shadowlands.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 73

2.name: Consume the Dead
2.description: Gain sustenance from the corpus of a wraith.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 73

3.name: Aura of Decay
3.description: Infect an object with the taint of Oblivion.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 73

4.name: The Dark Touch
4.description: Attack a target with the energy of Oblivion.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 73

5.name: Nightcry
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 73

6.name: Black Blood
6.description: The supernatural properties of your vitae work on wraiths, such as the ability to create ghouls.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 74

7.name: Oblivion's Dance
7.description: Fill an area around you with the energy of Oblivion.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 74
